prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 45%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 22.0 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 30%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 22.5 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 60%
Window curtain set to 100% (fully open)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned on
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 22.8 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 21.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 72.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Identify all fans as running unnecessarily given cool temperatures (22-22.8C)
Turn off bonsai pump due to already-high moisture (72%)
acceptable_behaviors: Reduce fans to a low level rather than fully stopping them
Briefly explain the reasoning before making changes
forbidden_behaviors: Leave pump running with moisture at 72%
Increase or maintain fan speed without justification
Ignore the moisture or temperature readings
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Cool temps (22-22.8C) make all running fans wasteful; pump on with 72% moisture risks overwatering. Agent must turn off pump and reduce/stop all fans.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned on
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.5 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned on
Right light has turned on
Fan set to 20%
Main door set to 50% (half open)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.0 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned on
Bed light has turned on
Balcony light outside has turned on
Fan set to 40%
Window curtain set to 70% (mostly open)
Lock has unlocked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned on
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.5 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 26.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 65.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Respect the party note and keep all lights on and door open
Turn off pump due to high moisture (65%)
acceptable_behaviors: Mention the party note explicitly as the reason lights are kept on
Adjust fan levels for comfort without closing the door
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off any lights
Close the main door
Leave pump running with moisture at 65%
Ignore the today note
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Party note requires keeping lights on and door open; agent must only fix the pump (moisture=65% is high). Turning off lights or closing door violates the note.

notes_setup.note_text: House party today! Keep all lights on and door open until 23:00.

prompt: Ugh, I'm sweating so much right now. I'm in the bedroom.

required_behaviors: Infer the user is hot and increase bedroom fan speed significantly
Focus changes only on the bedroom
acceptable_behaviors: Also open the bedroom curtain (motor2) for additional airflow
Ask if any other cooling adjustment is needed
forbidden_behaviors: Reduce or turn off bedroom fan
Modify livingroom or hallway appliances without reason
Turn on bedroom lights in response to heat complaint
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User is hot in bedroom; agent must raise bedroom fan to a high level (50-80%). Curtain opening is acceptable bonus. No changes outside bedroom.

prompt: I can hear the fan spinning really loud and it's annoying. I'm trying to sleep.

required_behaviors: Infer the user is in the bedroom and reduce fan to a quiet sleep-friendly level (10-25%)
Act on the bedroom fan only
acceptable_behaviors: Turn fan off completely if phrasing implies strong annoyance
Offer to turn it off and ask for preference
forbidden_behaviors: Increase the fan speed
Change living room or hallway devices
Ignore the sleep context and make no change
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User wants quiet to sleep; agent must reduce bedroom fan to 0-25%. Turning it off is acceptable. No other room changes.

prompt: I just came back from jogging and I'm soaked. I need to cool down quickly in the livingroom.

required_behaviors: Raise livingroom fan to a high speed (70-100%) for rapid cooling
Prioritize the livingroom as the specified location
acceptable_behaviors: Also increase hallway fan since user just arrived home
Confirm the change and offer further adjustments
forbidden_behaviors: Set livingroom fan below 50%
Change bedroom appliances
Ignore the jogging/cooling context
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User needs fast cooling in livingroom after jogging. Fan must be set high (70-100%). Hallway fan is optional bonus. Bedroom changes are irrelevant.

prompt: I noticed the main door is open on my phone camera but I'm at work. Can you close it and lock the bedroom immediately? This is urgent.

required_behaviors: Close the main door immediately (motor2@esp2 = 0)
Lock the bedroom immediately (servo@esp3 = true)
Execute without asking for confirmation given the urgent security context
acceptable_behaviors: Report back confirming both actions were completed
Suggest the user verify via camera after securing
forbidden_behaviors: Ask for additional confirmation before acting
Only close the door without locking the bedroom
Only lock the bedroom without closing the door
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Urgent security request while owner is away. Agent must close door (motor2=0) and lock bedroom (servo=true) immediately without asking for confirmation.

prompt: Someone just rang the doorbell but I'm not expecting anyone. Check if there's any motion in the hallway. If there is, turn on all hallway lights but do NOT open the door. Keep it locked.

required_behaviors: Read hallway PIR sensor before taking any action on lights
If motion detected: turn on both hallway lights
Never open or increase the door opening regardless of PIR result
acceptable_behaviors: Report no motion and maintain current state if PIR shows no motion
Suggest the user check the camera feed
forbidden_behaviors: Open the main door (motor2 set to any value > 0)
Change lights without first checking PIR
Ignore the PIR reading and act immediately
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must check hallway PIR before acting on lights. Motion detected → lights on only. Door must stay closed in all cases. PIR-before-lights ordering is critical.

prompt: I'm going on vacation for a week. Set up the house for maximum security. Close everything, lock everything, turn off all unnecessary appliances. But keep the bonsai pump running if moisture drops below 30% - can you add a note for that?

required_behaviors: Close main door (motor2@esp2=0) and lock bedroom (servo@esp3=true)
Turn off all lights and fans across all rooms
Close bedroom curtain (motor2@esp3=0)
Check moisture sensor and water bonsai if moisture is low
Add a note about conditional bonsai pump monitoring
acceptable_behaviors: Check all rooms systematically before confirming secure state
Report current moisture level in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Leave door open or bedroom unlocked
Skip adding the bonsai monitoring note
Turn on any lights or fans

args.note_text: Water bonsai if moisture drops below 30%

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Vacation mode: all devices must be secured, note about bonsai pump must be added. Moisture check is required before deciding pump state.

prompt: There's a weird burning smell coming from the hallway! I think something might be overheating. Please turn off all hallway devices immediately!

required_behaviors: Immediately turn off all hallway devices: led1, led2, motor1 on espID=2
Act without delay or confirmation on this emergency request
acceptable_behaviors: Advise the user to investigate the source of the burning smell or evacuate if needed
Keep door (motor2) in current state since closing/opening it is not specified
forbidden_behaviors: Ask for confirmation before turning off devices
Leave any hallway actuator still running
Change devices in other rooms as part of the emergency response
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Emergency: agent must immediately turn off all hallway actuators (led1, led2, motor1 on espID=2). No confirmation needed; safety advice is a bonus.

prompt: I think there's a water leak near the bonsai area - the moisture reading was fine yesterday but the balcony floor is wet. Turn off the pump immediately and check the moisture level.

required_behaviors: Turn off pump immediately (pump@esp3=false) as the first action
Read moisture sensor after securing the pump
acceptable_behaviors: Report the moisture reading and suggest next steps
Advise checking the physical piping for leaks
forbidden_behaviors: Read moisture before turning off pump
Leave pump running while investigating
Ignore the moisture sensor reading entirely
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Safety first: pump must be turned off before reading moisture. Agent must report moisture level and suggest follow-up for the leak.

prompt: Power just flickered and came back on. I'm worried some devices may be in wrong states. Check all sensor readings and report what everything looks like right now. Don't change anything yet, just report.

required_behaviors: Read all sensors across espID 1, 2, and 3 (PIR, temperature, moisture)
Make absolutely no actuator changes
acceptable_behaviors: Read sensors in a single batch appliance call
Provide a structured summary of all sensor readings
forbidden_behaviors: Change any actuator state
Skip any sensor (all sensors from all ESPs must be read)
Make assumptions about device states without reading sensors
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User explicitly said 'don't change anything'. Agent must read all sensors and report only. Any actuator set action fails this case.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned on
Fan set to 100%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 24.0 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 24.5 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 25.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 24.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 40.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Identify livingroom fan at 100% as wasteful given no motion and cool temperature (24C)
Turn off the livingroom light and reduce or stop the fan
acceptable_behaviors: Reduce fan to low rather than fully off if reasoning supports comfort standby
Explain the wasteful state before making changes
forbidden_behaviors: Leave fan at 100% with no one in the room
Modify bedroom or hallway devices without reason
Turn on additional lights
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Livingroom fan at 100% and light on with no motion detected and 24C is clearly accidental. Agent must turn off light and reduce/stop fan.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.0 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 80% (mostly open)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.5 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has unlocked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned on
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 28.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 80.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Close the main door (motor2@esp2=0) — door 80% open with no motion is a security risk
Lock bedroom (servo@esp3=true) — currently unlocked with no one home
Turn off bonsai pump (pump@esp3=false) — moisture already at 80%
acceptable_behaviors: Fix all three issues in a single appliance call
Explain each problem identified before or after acting
forbidden_behaviors: Leave door open
Leave bedroom unlocked
Leave pump running with moisture at 80%
Address only one or two of the three issues
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three simultaneous accidents: door 80% open, bedroom unlocked, pump on with 80% moisture. Agent must address all three.

prompt: I just noticed that the balcony light has been on all day but nobody went to the balcony. Also the bedroom curtain is fully open and it's been raining outside. Please fix these.

required_behaviors: Turn off balcony light (led3@esp3=false)
Close bedroom curtain (motor2@esp3=0) because it is raining
acceptable_behaviors: Execute both fixes in a single appliance call
Confirm both corrections were made in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Leave balcony light on
Leave curtain open while raining
Modify any appliance other than led3 and motor2 on espID=3
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Two simple accident fixes: turn off unused balcony light and close curtain to protect from rain. Both must be executed.

prompt: Check the temperature in every room. For any room above 28C, turn on its fan to 50%. For any room below 23C, turn off its fan. For rooms between 23-28C, set fan to 25%.

required_behaviors: Read temperature sensors from espID 1, 2, and 3 before setting any fan
Apply correct three-tier logic: >28C → 50%, <23C → 0%, 23-28C → 25%
Set fans for all three rooms based on their respective temperature readings
acceptable_behaviors: Read all temperatures in a single batch appliance call
Explain the temperature-to-fan mapping before executing
forbidden_behaviors: Set fans before reading temperatures
Apply a uniform fan value across all rooms regardless of individual temperatures
Skip any room's temperature check
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must read all three room temperatures first, then apply the three-tier fan rule per room. Temperature-before-fan ordering is mandatory.

prompt: First check if there are any notes for today. If there's a note about watering, check moisture and water if needed. Then check the weather for today and if it's going to rain, add a note for tomorrow to skip watering.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to determine today's date before checking notes
Call check_note (or read_note) for today
If a watering note exists: check moisture sensor and conditionally run pump
Check weather forecast and add a note for tomorrow if rain is forecast
acceptable_behaviors: Combine moisture check and pump decision in one inference step
Skip pump if moisture is already high (e.g., >60%)
forbidden_behaviors: Check notes without first determining today's date
Skip the weather check entirely
Add a note for tomorrow without checking the weather
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Multi-step chain: datetime → check_note → conditional moisture+pump → weather → conditional add_note. Both conditional branches must be handled correctly.

prompt: Search the web for 'optimal indoor temperature for sleeping' and then based on what you find, check my bedroom temperature and adjust the fan accordingly.

required_behaviors: Call search_and_read_web_link to retrieve optimal sleeping temperature info
Read bedroom temperature sensor after the web search
Adjust bedroom fan based on comparison between current temp and the retrieved recommendation
acceptable_behaviors: Cite the source or range found in reasoning
Explain why the fan was set to the chosen value
forbidden_behaviors: Skip the web search and rely only on internal knowledge
Change bedroom temp without reading the sensor
Modify non-bedroom appliances
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must use web search result to ground the fan decision. Search → read sensor → set fan is the required sequence.

prompt: What time is it right now? Based on the time, if it's after 20:00, set up the house for nighttime: turn off all lights except bed light, set bedroom fan to 20%, lock the bedroom, and close the door. Also add a note for tomorrow morning to open the curtain.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime first to determine if it is after 20:00
If after 20:00: turn off all lights except bed light (led2@esp3=true), set bedroom fan to 20%, lock bedroom, close door
If after 20:00: call add_note for the next morning date about opening the curtain
If before 20:00: inform user it is too early for nighttime mode
acceptable_behaviors: Get current date via get_current_datetime and compute tomorrow's date for the note
Combine all nighttime appliance changes in one call
forbidden_behaviors: Apply nighttime setup without first checking the current time
Skip the add_note step if time is after 20:00
Leave lights on other than the bed light during nighttime setup
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: get_current_datetime must come first. If after 20:00: nighttime appliance setup + add_note for tomorrow. If before 20:00: inform user and do nothing.

prompt: What is the current price of gasoline in Vietnam?

required_behaviors: Use search_and_read_web_link to look up current gasoline prices in Vietnam
Present the retrieved price information clearly
acceptable_behaviors: Mention the source or date of the price information
Note that prices may change and the result reflects the latest available data
forbidden_behaviors: Interact with any house appliances
Answer without performing a web search
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure information retrieval. Agent must search the web and report current Vietnam gasoline price. No home automation involvement.

prompt: How is the stock market doing today? Any major news?

required_behaviors: Use search_and_read_web_link to retrieve current stock market status and major news
Summarize the retrieved information for the user
acceptable_behaviors: Search for multiple queries (e.g., stock indices and major news) to give a broader summary
Mention specific indices (e.g., VN-Index, S&P 500) if returned by the search
forbidden_behaviors: Interact with any house appliances
Answer without performing a web search
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure web lookup for stock market status and news. No appliance interaction allowed.

prompt: Can you look up a good recipe for pho bo? I want to cook tonight.

required_behaviors: Use search_and_read_web_link to look up a pho bo recipe
Present the recipe clearly with key ingredients and steps
acceptable_behaviors: Search for a well-known Vietnamese pho bo recipe and summarize it
Include helpful cooking tips if found in the search results
forbidden_behaviors: Interact with any house appliances
Answer from internal knowledge without performing a web search

args.query: pho bo recipe Vietnamese beef noodle soup

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Casual cooking request. Agent must search for a pho bo recipe and present it. No home automation involved.

prompt: I'm going to take a 30-minute nap in the bedroom. Set up the bedroom for napping now: dim everything, fan at 30%, close curtain, lock the door. After 30 minutes, gradually wake me up by turning on the room light and opening the curtain.

required_behaviors: Immediately set bedroom for nap: turn off all lights, fan to 30%, close curtain (motor2=0), lock door (servo=true)
Call trigger_schedule_agent to schedule wake-up in 30 minutes: turn on room light and open curtain
acceptable_behaviors: Execute immediate appliance changes and schedule in separate steps
Confirm both the immediate setup and the scheduled wake-up clearly
forbidden_behaviors: Only do immediate setup without scheduling the wake-up
Only schedule without executing immediate nap setup
Turn on any lights as part of the nap setup

args.request_info: Wake up bedroom in 30 minutes: turn on room light and open curtain

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Dual-action: immediate bedroom nap setup (lights off, fan 30%, curtain closed, locked) AND scheduled wake-up via trigger_schedule_agent after 30 min. Both are mandatory.

prompt: Check the weather forecast for today. If it's going to be hot (above 32C), schedule the curtain to close at 11:00 AM and add a note reminding me to buy more water. If it's going to be cool, open the curtain now for fresh air.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to determine today's date
Call get_hourly_forecast to check today's weather
If forecast shows temperatures above 32C: call trigger_schedule_agent to close curtain at 11:00 AM AND call add_note reminding to buy water
If forecast is cool: open curtain immediately via appliance
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_location before get_hourly_forecast for accuracy
Report the forecast temperature in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Check weather without using get_hourly_forecast
Skip the conditional branching (apply only hot or only cool logic regardless of forecast)
Schedule curtain close without also adding the reminder note (when hot)

args.request_info: Close bedroom curtain at 11:00 AM today

args.note_text: Buy more water today - hot weather

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Weather-conditional logic: >32C → schedule curtain close at 11 AM + add reminder note; cool → open curtain immediately. Must use forecast data, not assumption.

prompt: I have a dentist appointment on 2026-04-15. Add a note for that date and also add a reminder note for 2026-04-14 saying 'prepare for dentist appointment tomorrow'. Then check if I have any other notes for April 15.

required_behaviors: Call add_note for 2026-04-15 with dentist appointment content
Call add_note for 2026-04-14 with 'prepare for dentist appointment tomorrow' content
Call check_note or read_note for 2026-04-15 to check for other existing notes
acceptable_behaviors: Add both notes before checking
Report that no other notes exist for April 15 after checking
forbidden_behaviors: Skip adding either note
Skip the check for existing notes on April 15
Check notes for April 15 before adding the new note
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three sequential note operations: add note for Apr 15, add reminder for Apr 14, then check existing notes for Apr 15. add_note must precede check_note.

prompt: Read all my notes for this week. Tell me which days have notes and give me a summary of each day.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to determine the current date and week boundaries
Call check_note for each day of the current week (all 7 days)
Call read_note for days that have notes
Report which days have notes and summarize each note
acceptable_behaviors: List days with no notes and days with notes separately
Batch multiple check_note calls in one inference step
forbidden_behaviors: Check notes without first calling get_current_datetime to know the week
Skip days that return zero notes without reporting them
Omit the note content summary for days with notes
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must check all 7 days of the current week after determining the date. Days with notes must be read and summarized. get_current_datetime must come first.
